meaning: adj.鐩稿啿绐佺殑,涓嶄竴鑷寸殑,鐩哥煕鐩剧殑
examples: The president faces conflicting advice from his brain trust.
They confused me with conflicting accounts of what happened.
But Duffy says conflicting polling data makes it unclear who Barkley is hurting the most.
This mission must be so magnetic that everyone pulls in the same direction despite conflicting interests.
